source_text: A capacitor may be used to hold the AIRs closed for up to 250 ms after the Shutdown Circuit Opens EV.7.2.2 ## EV.5.5 High Voltage Disconnect - HVD A High Voltage Disconnect (HVD) must be included to quickly disconnect one or both poles of the Accumulator EV.11.3.2 EV.5.5.1 The High Voltage Disconnect (HVD) must be: a
